name: kdrs-overlay
description: Knappe der Rauen Schlacht - Windows companion overlay for Age of Empires II build orders.
author: KDRS

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/detector.js && node --check src/main/capture-provider.js && node --check src/main/ocr-worker-thread.js && node --check src/main/build-engine.js && node --check src/main/settings-store.js && node --check src/main/ocr-defaults.js && node --check src/main/loading-screen-parser.js && node --check src/renderer/dashboard.js && node --check src/renderer/overlay.js && node --check scripts/benchmark-capture.js && node --check scripts/test-villager-ocr.js && node --check scripts/test-screen-fixtures.js && node --check scripts/test-loading-screen-fixtures.js && node --check scripts/test-loading-screen-parser.js && node --check scripts/test-build-progress.js && node --check scripts/test-detector-timing.js && node --check scripts/calibrate-resource-regions.js && node -e "require('./src/data/build-orders.json'); require('./src/data/hera-build-orders.json'); require('./src/data/civilizations.json'); require('./src/data/opponent-recommendations.json'); require('./examples/custom-build-orders.example.json')"
